zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille de Bourgogne於1065年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔時，她的父親Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne46歲，母親Étiennette de Longwy-Metz31歲。她於1080年與Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne在法國布格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1102年3月23日在她的家鄉享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille de Bourgogne was born in 1065, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, was 46 and her mother, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, was 31. She married Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne in 1080, in Burgundy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 March 1102, in her hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybille de Bourgogne est née en 1065, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne en 1080, à Bourgogne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1102, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybille de Bourgogne 1065 in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne 46 und ihre Mutter Étiennette de Longwy-Metz 31. Sie hat 1080 in Burgund, Frankreich Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. März 1102 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Bourgogne è nata il nel 1065 nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne nel 1080, nel Bourgogne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 marzo 1102, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sybille de Bourgogneが1065年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンで生まれた時，父Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogneは46歳，母Étiennette de Longwy-Metzは31歳であった。1080年にフランスボウルゴグンでEudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1102年3月23日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille de Bourgogne(이)가 1065년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Étiennette de Longwy-Metz(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1080년 프랑스 부르고그니에서 Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1102년 3월 23일 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Bourgogne nasceu em 1065, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne em 1080, em Bourgogne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1102, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybille de Bourgogne родилась в 1065 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne в 1080 г. в местности бургогн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 марта 1102 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybille de Bourgogne nació en 1065, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Guillaume Ier duc de Bourgogne, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Étiennette de Longwy-Metz, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Eudes Ier dit Borel duc de Bourgogne en 1080, en Bourgogne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1102, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
